meta.summary: plotsr visualizes structural similarities, synteny, and rearrangements between chromosome-level genome assemblies.
meta.description: plotsr visualizes structural similarities, synteny, and rearrangements between chromosome-level genome assemblies.

test: plotsr -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Plotting structural rearrangements between genomes' >/dev/null && plotsr -h 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--genomes' >/dev/null
python3 -c 'import plotsr,numpy,pandas,matplotlib; assert plotsr.__version__ == "1.1.1"; assert matplotlib.get_backend().lower() == "agg"'

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-plotsr-bedpe && cd /tmp/taf-plotsr-bedpe && printf 'chr1	1000
' > A.chrlen && printf 'chr1	1000
' > B.chrlen && printf 'A.chrlen	A	ft:cl;lw:1.2
B.chrlen	B	ft:cl;lw:1.2
' > genomes.txt && printf 'chr1	0	1000	chr1	0	1000	SYN	-
chr1	200	350	chr1	220	370	INV	cl:red;lw:2
' > ab.bedpe && printf 'chr1	100	180
chr1	500	650
' > feats.bed && printf 'feats.bed	Features	ft:bed;bw:100;ti:1;tt:l;lc:blue
' > tracks.txt && printf 'chr1	250	251	A	mt:o;mc:black;ms:3;tt:marker;tp:0.02;ts:6;tc:black
' > markers.bed && printf 'legend:F
' > base.cfg && plotsr --bp ab.bedpe --genomes genomes.txt --tracks tracks.txt --markers markers.bed --cfg base.cfg -o out.png -W 3 -H 2 -f 6 -d 80 --lf bedpe.log >/dev/null 2> bedpe.err && test -s out.png && file out.png | grep -F 'PNG image data' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-plotsr-syri && cd /tmp/taf-plotsr-syri && printf 'chr1	1000
' > A.chrlen && printf 'chr1	1000
' > B.chrlen && printf 'A.chrlen	A	ft:cl;lw:1.2
B.chrlen	B	ft:cl;lw:1.2
' > genomes.txt && printf 'chr1	1	1000	-	-	chr1	1	1000	SYN1	-	SYN	-
chr1	200	350	-	-	chr1	220	370	INV1	-	INV	-
' > ab.syri.out && plotsr --sr ab.syri.out --genomes genomes.txt --chr chr1 -o out.svg -W 3 -H 2 -f 6 -d 80 --lf syri.log >/dev/null 2> syri.err && test -s out.svg && grep -F '<svg' out.svg >/dev/null
